name: Research Assistant
description: Searches the web, gathers information from multiple sources, synthesizes findings with citations, and produces structured research reports.

tools.name: research/web-search
tools.description: Search the web for a given query and return ranked results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

tools.name: research/fetch-page
tools.description: Fetch the full text content of a web page given its URL.

tools.name: research/extract-links
tools.description: Extract all hyperlinks from a web page given its URL.
